timeline.description: Researching AutoGen and CrewAI frameworks to understand how agents communicate and hand off tasks during software engineering processes.
Deep-diving into Platform Engineering principles and cognitive load theory to apply in internal build infrastructures.
Reviewed recent container runtime specifications, security sandboxing enhancements, and overlay network optimizations.

books.title: Team Topologies
books.author: Matthew Skelton and Manuel Pais
books.takeaway: Organizing teams around platform concepts, stream alignment, and enabling structures is critical for reducing cognitive load.

books.title: Designing Data-Intensive Applications
books.author: Martin Kleppmann
books.takeaway: Understanding trade-offs in storage engines, replication algorithms, and consensus protocol options.

daily_notes.notes: When triggering builds programmatically using REST APIs, ensure content-type headers are set precisely to `application/json` and credentials use token-based authentication instead of base64 basic auth, as newer instances deprecate basic access.

Avoid using `+=` on standard arrays in loops since it recreates the array in memory each time. Instead, use `[System.Collections.Generic.List[Object]]` or pipeline output directly to variables to speed up processing of large lists.
